sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70398" key="neo/stratos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεό-στρᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τείρων</foreign> (Lat. <sense id="n70398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tiro) PMon.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0551.tlg017.perseus-grc1:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(vi A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
